name: review-strict
description: Two repo-adaptive, adversarially-verified analysis skills at staff-engineer rigor. /review-strict: multi-agent PR/branch/diff review (correctness, security, architecture, tests, migration safety). /audit-strict: deep whole-repo architecture audit — component map, flows, lifecycle, data model, quality audit and a prioritized roadmap written to .ai-abstracts/audit/. Both adapt to each repo's own rules (AGENTS.md, CLAUDE.md, .claude/skills) and share a verify-skeptic pass; English by default, configurable via env vars. Independent of any spec pipeline.
